mapper.sql: promise_id, promise_title, promise_icon_path, promise_color, promise_category, promise_comment, promise_start, promise_end, reminder_minutes, repeat_type, all_day, user_id, status, reg_date, mod_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO promise ( promise_title, promise_icon_path, promise_color, promise_category, promise_comment, promise_start, promise_end, reminder_minutes, repeat_type, all_day, user_id, status ) VALUES ( #{promiseTitle}, #{promiseIconPath}, #{promiseColor}, #{promiseCategory}, #{promiseComment}, #{promiseStart}, #{promiseEnd}, #{reminderMinutes}, #{repeatType}, #{allDay}, #{userId}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM promise WHERE promise_id = #{promiseId} AND
SELECT FROM promise WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ORDER BY promise_start ASC

SELECT FROM promise WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (
(YEAR(promise_start) = #{year} AND MONTH(promise_start) = #{month}) OR
(promise_end IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(promise_end) = #{year} AND MONTH(promise_end) = #{month}) OR
(promise_start < DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-', #{month}, '-01')) AND promise_end >= DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-', #{month}, '-01'))) ) AND ORDER BY promise_start ASC

SELECT FROM promise WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ( (promise_start BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) OR (promise_end IS NOT NULL AND promise_end BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) OR (promise_start <= #{startDate} AND (promise_end IS NULL OR promise_end >= #{endDate})) ) AND ORDER BY promise_start ASC

SELECT FROM promise WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ( DATE(promise_start) = CURDATE() OR (DATE(promise_start) <= CURDATE() AND (promise_end IS NULL OR DATE(promise_end) >= CURDATE())) ) AND ORDER BY promise_start ASC
SELECT FROM promise WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND promise_start >= NOW() AND ORDER BY promise_start ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.* FROM promise p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND u.schedule_set = 1 AND p.reminder_minutes IS NOT NULL AND p.promise_start IS NOT NULL AND DATE_SUB(p.promise_start, INTERVAL p.reminder_minutes MINUTE) <= #{currentTime} AND p.promise_start > #{currentTime} ORDER BY p.promise_start ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM promise WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND
SELECT FROM promise WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND promise_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND ORDER BY promise_start DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE promise
promise_title = #{promiseTitle}, promise_icon_path = #{promiseIconPath}, promise_color = #{promiseColor}, promise_category = #{promiseCategory}, promise_comment = #{promiseComment}, promise_start = #{promiseStart}, promise_end = #{promiseEnd}, reminder_minutes = #{reminderMinutes}, repeat_type = #{repeatType}, all_day = #{allDay},
WHERE promise_id = #{promiseId} AND
